title: Oden’s Past Begins to Define Wano’s Tragedy
description: On pages 2–5, this part focuses on Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4 as The story turns to Oden’s past, showing how his life, Whitebeard, Roger, and Orochi shaped Wano’s tragedy.
scene: The story turns to Oden’s past, showing how his life, Whitebeard, Roger, and Orochi shaped Wano’s tragedy.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: This area is known for its...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Not a single factory in sight...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Grand, Flourishing Forest.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: THE VEGETATION THRIVES...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Due to the nearby clear rivers and the sparkling sea.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: This is a tale from the past...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: I caught one!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: A TALE ABOUT WHEN WANO WAS BRIMING WITH LIFE...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I am telling the truth!! I swear it!! I saw it with my own two eyes!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: The mountain was moving....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: The mountain moved!?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Indeed. We fled from it and ended up here!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: It was even growling!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Perhaps you encountered a mountain God?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The three of you are quite chipper, considering the circumstances... Fufuffu...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Dehehe, nothing gets past you, O-TSURU~!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Can you keep a secret for us?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: The truth is...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We were finally able to capture an elusive creature!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: It took us a whole year!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Take a look at it!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Wow, what a beautiful boar!! Its skin is snow white!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If we take this little guy to the capital, we can trade him in for one whole piece of white gold!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Huh!? A piece of white gold!?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: "If you could buy a giant mansion with that kind of money!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Boss Kurokama has been saying for years...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: that he wants a rare white boar, probably to display outside his store.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He put a bounty on it, but nobody has been able to capture it until now!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: That would be quite distaste- full!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: White boars are considered heralds of the gods!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Dahahaha!! Cute story and all, but this is just an exotic animal!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Ah... hang on a moment...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Did you steal money from my wallet again!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Kin'Emon!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: OW, OW, OW, OWWWWWWWWWWWW!! Stop it, TsURUJO!! Think of our childhood friendship!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: My big bros have been having money issues!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Your "Big Bros"!? I bet they gambled their money away!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: How many times have I loaned you money now!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: If you ever touch my money again...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I will rip out your organs and sell them to reclaim your debt!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If you cannot afford to pay me back... then I will strip you of all your belongings as repayment!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...uh, thanks for the meal, O-tsuru! The money is on the table...

summary: This section advances the Wano - Oden and the Old Era storyline with 42 dialogue beats. The story turns to Oden’s past, showing how his life, Whitebeard, Roger, and Orochi shaped Wano’s tragedy.
